items.title: At Ashvita’s, Mimesis by Thukral & Tagra reflects on data, memory, surveillance and the digital selves we leave behind
items.summary: Now open at Ashvita’s flagship gallery in Ozone Premia, Mylapore, until July 17, the showcase explores the relationship between digital technology and human identity, prompting visitors to reflect on themes of data, memory, and surveillance. Through immersive artworks, the exhibition challenges audiences to consider the implications of their online footprints and the blurred lines between reality and its digital representations
